name: flip-the-script
description: Installs a standing self-distrust prior: the model treats its own unverified recall as stale and overconfident by default, and routes any version/API/current-state/exact-number/long-tail claim to external ground truth (docs, search, read-the-source, measure, or a fresh-context check) before asserting. UserPromptSubmit hook every turn, primed at SessionStart. Calibrated, not paralytic — quiet on stable well-known facts.
